game_info.title: Untitled Game
game_info.concept: **王国保卫战4 (Kingdom Rush Vengeance):** Players strategically deploy and upgrade 22 distinct tower types along fixed paths on a map by tapping empty slots and selecting from a UI menu, aiming to prevent over 60 enemy types from reaching the exit portal. Each tower has 3-4 upgrade tiers, branching into two specialized forms at tier 3, offering unique damage types and abilities, while 17 controllable heroes with 3-4 active abilities gain experience and level up during missions. Waves of enemies, varying in health, armor, and special attacks, spawn at increasing frequencies and speeds across 42 levels, requiring strategic tower placement and hero management. Progression involves earning stars from level completion to unlock new towers, heroes, and 30 permanent upgrades, with difficulty scaling through denser waves, stronger enemies, and 7 unique boss encounters. Players win a level by defeating all enemy waves without letting a set number of enemies (typically 20) pass through the exit portal, or lose if too many enemies escape.
game_info.description: Defend your kingdom against waves of invading enemies! Strategically place towers along the path to stop enemies from reaching your portal. Earn gold from defeating enemies to build and upgrade towers. Each tower has unique abilities and can be upgraded to become more powerful. Survive all waves without letting too many enemies through to win!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Move cursor to select tower slots
Space: Open tower menu / Confirm selection
Z: Cancel / Close menu / Sell tower (when tower selected)
Shift: Upgrade selected tower
Enter: Start game
ESC: Pause/Unpause game
R: Restart (return to start screen)

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic tower placement and menu interaction. Validates that the player can navigate the grid, open tower menus, and place towers in empty slots. Ensures the game state properly tracks tower placements and gold expenditure.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate to different empty slots on the path, open the tower menu, and place towers of different types. Verify that gold is deducted correctly and towers appear on the map. Test upgrading towers when sufficient gold is available.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully place multiple towers, see gold decrease appropriately, and verify towers are created in the game state. Towers should be visible on screen and properly initialized. The test validates core placement mechanics work correctly.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests optimal winning strategy. Implements strategic tower placement at key chokepoints to maximize damage output. Places high-damage towers early in the path and upgrades them to handle increasingly difficult waves. Monitors enemy health and gold accumulation.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Place archer towers at the first available slots near the start of the path for maximum damage time. Upgrade towers to tier 2 when gold permits. Add barracks towers to block and slow enemies. Continue upgrading to tier 3 for specialized damage, prioritizing towers closest to spawn.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Successfully defend against all enemy waves without exceeding the life loss threshold. Achieve GAME_OVER_WIN state by defeating all waves. Validate that strategic placement and upgrades are sufficient to handle increasing enemy difficulty and boss encounters.
